strengths: Direct AI agent development experience at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — a rare and explicitly required skill
Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React production experience across Optilyz, RIDE Capital, and re:cinq, with AWS CDK, MongoDB, and Docker also evidenced
Strong engineering culture: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, code reviews, conference talks, and open-source testing tooling (Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
concerns: Nest.js is absent from the entire resume despite being the primary backend framework; no evidence of familiarity with its DI/module architecture
None of the required testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) are named anywhere; testing credentials come from D-language libraries, not the JS/TS ecosystem
Kotlin is not mentioned at all; Java appears only in embedded/robotics contexts (Altom, 2016–2018), not in backend service development
response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of professional development across a wide stack and has directly relevant AI agent infrastructure experience at re:cinq — a scarce competency the role explicitly requires. His TypeScript/Node.js/React production credentials are solid and multi-year. However, the primary framework (Nest.js) is entirely absent, which is a concrete gap for a role where it is the backbone of the backend. The required JS/TS testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) are also unmentioned, and while his TDD philosophy is evident, the ecosystem fit is unverified. The score reflects strong core fullstack alignment and standout AI agent experience, offset by a verifiable primary-stack gap.
